message:
refactor(webgl): Simplify WebGL renderer to use shared GlyphAtlas

Replace complex MSDF (Multi-channel Signed Distance Field) text
rendering with the same pre-rendered GlyphAtlas used by the Canvas 2D
renderer. This ensures pixel-perfect visual consistency between
renderers while maintaining GPU acceleration benefits.

Key changes:

WebGLSequenceRenderer.ts:
- Switch from MSDFAtlas to GlyphAtlas (shared with Canvas renderer)
- Upload GlyphAtlas canvas directly to WebGL texture
- Use NEAREST filtering for exact Canvas drawImage() matching
- Remove unused updateSequenceTextureDiffMask/ReadingFrame imports
- Simplify uniform handling and remove dead code paths
- Add viewMode-aware glyph atlas sizing

shaders.ts:
- Remove all hardcoded NT_BG/NT_FG/AA_BG/AA_FG color palettes
- Remove MSDF median() distance field calculation
- Simplify to pure texture sampling from pre-rendered atlas
- Add u_atlasSize/u_nucleotideCount uniforms for atlas indexing
- WebGL 1 fallback shaders updated to match

useSequenceGrid.ts:
- Add viewMode to WebGL detection dependencies
- Skip WebGL for amino acid/dual modes (shader only renders DNA)
- Canvas 2D handles AA coloring and dual-row layout

SequenceTexture.ts:
- Reserve bit 1 for future highlights (commented unused FLAG_IS_HIGHLIGHT)

Performance: Maintains 60fps instanced rendering (100K+ cells per draw
call) while eliminating visual discrepancies between renderers.

Addresses: phage_explorer-1xa1 (sequence grid scrolling performance)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Still need live screen-reader run.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-07T22:01:53.674557Z","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:11:29.945343703Z","closed_at":"2025-12-20T19:02:04.786869076Z","close_reason":"Completed automated screen-reader proxy checks: fixed Vite runtime crash affecting overlays after axe-core runs; Playwright WCAG 2.1 A/AA audit passes; manual VoiceOver/NVDA checklist added in comments","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1x12","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-2xt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T22:09:09.001736Z","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1x12","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-ld7x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T22:10:02.917311Z","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":132,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1x12","author":"ubuntu","text":"Fixed a runtime crash that prevented a11y audit + hotkey-driven overlays after axe-core runs. Root cause: type-only  was re-exported as a value.

Changes:
- packages/web/src/components/overlays/primitives/index.ts: export  as  (runtime-safe)
- packages/web/src/components/primitives/index.ts: same fix

Validation:
- bunx playwright test e2e/accessibility.spec.ts --project chromium
- bun run typecheck

Manual screen-reader checklist (needs real OS):
- VoiceOver (macOS): navigate main page, open/close Help (?), Search (/), Command palette (:), verify focus stays trapped in overlay and returns to the opener on close.
- NVDA (Windows): same checklist; confirm overlay titles announced (role=dialog + aria-labelledby) and close button is reachable/announced.","created_at":"2025-12-20T19:01:17Z"},{"id":133,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1x12","author":"ubuntu","text":"Correction: Root cause was type-only interface GenomeTrackProps being re-exported as a runtime value. Fixed by switching to `export type { GenomeTrackProps }` in:
- packages/web/src/components/overlays/primitives/index.ts
- packages/web/src/components/primitives/index.ts

This prevents the Vite dev runtime error: "does not provide an export named GenomeTrackProps" and allows the Playwright+axe flow to keep working after audits.","created_at":"2025-12-20T19:01:34Z"}]}
-{"id":"phage_explorer-1xa1","title":"Sequence grid scrolling: black regions / slow repaint (iOS Safari + desktop)","description":"## Problem
Scrolling inside the SequenceView canvas frequently shows black/unpainted regions that repaint slowly (worst on iPhone Safari). Reports persist across many attempted fixes.

## Repro
1) Open web app, open Sequence view.
2) Scroll/drag quickly (mouse wheel + trackpad; iPhone Safari touch drag).
3) Observe black/blank regions inside the canvas; repaint lags behind input.

## Expected
Smooth, continuous updates with no black/blank regions and stable 60fps feel.

## Primary code areas
- packages/web/src/rendering/CanvasSequenceGridRenderer.ts
- packages/web/src/rendering/VirtualScroller.ts
- packages/web/src/hooks/useSequenceGrid.ts
- packages/web/src/components/SequenceView.tsx

Features: GPU-accelerated instanced rendering (100K+ cells in single draw call), uniform-based scrolling (no geometry updates = 60fps), MSDF text rendering, automatic fallback to Canvas 2D, WebGL 2 with WebGL 1 fallback. Currently enabled for DNA mode; AA/dual modes use Canvas 2D. Review pass completed: fixed texture sampling precision, removed dead shader code, added viewMode-aware renderer selection. All 1210 tests pass. Next: verify on iOS Safari.","created_at":"2026-01-31T01:21:32Z"}]}
